input.command:
TOKEN="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"

# Upload og-image.avif
CONTENT=$(base64 -w 0 /home/user/sandbox/workspace/frontend/public/og-image.avif)
SHA=$(curl -s -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" https://api.github.com/repos/GandhiOnchain/gtool/contents/frontend/public/og-image.avif | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('sha',''))" 2>/dev/null)

PAYLOAD=$(python3 -c "
import json
d = {'message': 'Add OG image and update Farcaster manifest', 'content': '$CONTENT'}
if '$SHA': d['sha'] = '$SHA'
print(json.dumps(d))
")

curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PUT \
  -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "$PAYLOAD" \
  https://api.github.com/repos/GandhiOnchain/gtool/contents/frontend/public/og-image.avif
